device/support-pack runtime condition and recovery counters
bounded queue, journal, and presentation status counters
meaningful runtime transitions recorded by the bounded runtime spine
governed command/operator actions admitted or rejected by the shell

layer_rules.authority_scope: shell-facing posture and operator review surface
layer_rules.canonical_when: the shell is rendering current session posture
layer_rules.notes: This layer should stay readable for operators and reviewers and does not need to expose support-pack implementation detail.

layer_rules.canonical_when: a reviewer needs the current runtime posture for the active bounded slice
layer_rules.notes: This layer is the preferred human-facing runtime state for lifecycle review bundles.

layer_rules.canonical_when: device-specific condition is needed to explain degradation, disconnects, or recovery stages
layer_rules.notes: This layer may use provider-specific states such as ready or degraded while still mapping cleanly into platform families.

layer_rules.canonical_when: multiple layers must be compared without implying contradiction
layer_rules.notes: This layer intentionally normalizes families, not every concrete state token.

layer_rules.canonical_when: a package needs one concise runtime phrase that remains traceable back to runtime and adapter truth
layer_rules.notes: This layer is derived and must never override deeper technical evidence.

transition_trace.summary: quick start initiated for active device

operator_events.detail: startup-open smoke completed after healthy baseline was confirmed

phase_records.note: observed state family falls within the accepted phase set
phase_records.rationale: The bounded slice should reach a healthy live posture before the disturbance is introduced.

checks.message: rollup state family `live_ready_healthy` matches canonical runtime state family.
checks.name: rollup_matches_canonical_state

checks.message: reviewer summary matches the canonical bundle renderer.
checks.name: reviewer_summary_matches_canonical_bundle

checks.message: final phase posture matches the reviewer rollup state family.
checks.name: final_phase_matches_rollup

checks.message: operator and harness markers remain distinct from runtime event rows.
checks.name: operator_markers_are_distinct

checks.message: no disconnect evidence was required for this run.
checks.name: disconnect_has_runtime_evidence

checks.message: no recovery evidence was required for this run.
checks.name: recovery_has_runtime_evidence

checks.message: startup-open smoke reached a healthy live baseline posture.
checks.name: real_mode_startup_baseline_present

checks.message: startup-open run did not retain explicit startup/open-class runtime rows in the recent event window.
checks.name: startup_open_has_runtime_evidence

semantic_consistency.summary: Runtime evidence consistency passed with advisories.
